title: Hurevo ERP
description: Enterprise Resource Planning system designed specifically for MSMEs.

content.overview: Hurevo ERP is a comprehensive, single-tenant Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) system designed specifically for micro, small, and medium enterprises (MSMEs). This system provides a high-level overview of the core features and technical capabilities that make Hurevo ERP an ideal solution to showcase in portfolios or offer to prospective clients.

coreValue.title: Bankability
coreValue.description: The foundation of Hurevo ERP is Bankability. Every financial transaction across the system automatically generates SAK EMKM-compliant double-entry journal entries. This automation ensures business owners always maintain audit-ready financial records, which simplifies tax preparation and increases their eligibility for external business funding.

features.title: Accounting
features.description: Automates general ledger operations, manages chart of accounts, and ensures strict financial compliance.

features.title: Customer Relationship Management (CRM)
features.description: Manages customer data, sales pipelines, and communication history to improve client retention.

features.title: Supply Chain Management (SCM) and Inventory
features.description: Tracks stock levels in real-time, handles product variations, and optimizes procurement workflows.

features.title: Human Resources Information System (HRIS)
features.description: Streamlines employee data management, attendance tracking, and organizational structures.

features.title: Point of Sale (POS)
features.description: Provides an offline-first companion mobile application that synchronizes transactions and inventory data seamlessly with the main ERP API.

features.title: Payment Gateway
features.description: Integrates secure processing for digital transactions, invoicing, and automated payment reconciliation.

features.title: Financial Reports
features.description: Delivers real-time insights through automated, comprehensive reporting dashboards and PDF generation.

architecture.title: Framework
architecture.description: Built on Laravel 12.x utilizing strict typing and a dedicated service layer. This ensures business logic remains separated from controllers.

architecture.title: Administration Panel
architecture.description: Uses Filament v4 combined with Livewire and Flux to provide a highly reactive, responsive user interface.

architecture.title: Database Architecture
architecture.description: Uses PostgreSQL with UUID primary keys. The single-tenant deployment model ensures complete data isolation and privacy for each organization.

architecture.title: API Design
architecture.description: Exposes a secure REST API via Laravel Sanctum, providing the backend infrastructure for the offline-first mobile POS application.

architecture.title: Performance
architecture.description: Runs on Laravel Octane to maximize application speed and handle concurrent requests efficiently.

content.deployment: Hurevo ERP operates on a license-based distribution model. The independent, single-tenant architecture lets you deploy completely isolated software instances for each client. This approach guarantees complete data ownership and security while maintaining a standardized, easily upgradable core product.

title: SixEight
description: 3D Models & Design Studio platform for international B2C/B2B commissions.

content.overview: SixEight is a specialized 3D Models & Design studio platform built for international B2C and B2B markets. The platform replaces fragmented freelance workflows with a centralized client portal for 3D model commissions, featuring interactive 3D showcases and an intelligent ticketing system.

coreValue.title: Streamlined Creative Workflow
coreValue.description: SixEight eliminates the chaos of email-based commission management. The platform's structured ticketing system captures all technical specifications upfront—from polygon count to deliverable formats—reducing scope creep and ensuring every project begins with a perfectly structured, risk-mitigated brief.

features.title: Interactive 3D Portfolio
features.description: Showcases 3D models directly in the browser using WebGL technology. Clients can view models from any angle, inspect details, and experience the studio's work in immersive 3D before commissioning.

features.title: Intelligent Ticketing System
features.description: Dynamic project intake form with conditional logic based on project type (Character, Hard Surface, ArchViz, etc.). Captures all technical specs including polygon budget, texture resolution, PBR workflow, and rigging requirements upfront.

features.title: Client Portal & Dashboard
features.description: B2C and B2B clients access a dedicated portal to track project status, communicate with artists, and download deliverables. Reduces email threads by 40% and eliminates status update requests.

features.title: Spatial Feedback System
features.description: Clients can leave annotations directly on 3D models in the browser. Comments are anchored to specific geometry coordinates, transforming subjective feedback into precise, actionable instructions.

features.title: Secure File Management
features.description: Protected upload portal for concept art and reference materials. Deliverables are locked until final approval, with time-expiring download URLs and strict file type validation.

features.title: Multi-Market Support
features.description: Built for international clientele with support for both B2C individual commissions and B2B enterprise accounts with custom requirements and NDA workflows.

architecture.title: Framework
architecture.description: Built on Laravel with Domain-Driven Design principles. Utilizes RBAC middleware to enforce strict access controls differentiating between B2C clients, B2B accounts, internal artists, and administrators.

architecture.title: Frontend Stack
architecture.description: Uses InertiaJS with React and TailwindCSS for a seamless SPA experience. 3D viewer built with React Three Fiber for optimized WebGL rendering of GLB/glTF assets with lazy loading.

architecture.title: 3D Viewer Integration
architecture.description: Custom WebGL implementation using Three.js via React Three Fiber. Supports multiple 3D formats and enables in-context spatial feedback with annotation features anchored to geometry coordinates.

architecture.title: Database & State Management
architecture.description: PostgreSQL with polymorphic relationships for tickets, files, and communications. State machine implementation tracks projects through programmatic workflow stages with automated notifications.

architecture.title: Asset Optimization
architecture.description: Automated GLB compression, texture scaling, and polygon decimation workflows. Ensures web-facing models load quickly while maintaining visual quality for portfolio presentation.

content.deployment: SixEight operates as a custom-branded platform for the studio. The Laravel-based architecture supports single-tenant deployment with complete data isolation. The platform is designed to scale from individual artist operations to multi-artist studios with advanced DAM (Digital Asset Management) capabilities in future phases.
